ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the vehicle */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Automatic, Manual) */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel (e.g., Petrol, Diesel, Hybrid) */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax amount */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Miles per gallon (MPG) */,
  "engine_size" REAL /* Engine size in liters */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., Sedan, SUV, Truck) */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "exterior_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle's exterior */,
  "interior_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the vehicle's interior */,
  "features" TEXT /* Additional features of the vehicle */,
  "manufactured_date" TEXT /* Date the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "imported" INTEGER /* Whether the vehicle is imported or not */,
  "warranty_expiration" TEXT /* Date the vehicle's warranty expires */,
  "dealer_acquisition_cost" REAL /* Cost at which the dealership acquired the vehicle */,
  "estimated_retail_value" REAL /* Estimated retail value of the vehicle */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., New, Used, Sold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES vehicle_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle type (e.g., Sedan, SUV, Truck) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle type */,
  "average_mpg" REAL /* Average miles per gallon for the vehicle type */,
  "average_tax" REAL /* Average tax for the vehicle type */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price for the vehicle type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dealerships" (
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dealership */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the dealership */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the dealership */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the dealership */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the dealership */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the dealership is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the dealership is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the dealership */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the dealership */,
  "opened_date" TEXT /* Date the dealership opened */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager of the dealership */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dealership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dealerships_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("representative_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., North, South, East, West) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "sales_target" INTEGER /* Sales target for the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the sales target is set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being sold */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership where the sale occurred */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the sale occurred */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the vehicle was sold */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales representative who made the sale */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "final_price" REAL /* Final price after applying the discount */,
  "warranty_purchased" INTEGER /* Whether the customer purchased a warranty */,
  "warranty_cost" REAL /* Cost of the warranty if purchased */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_representative_id FOREIGN KEY ("representative_id") REFERENCES sales_representatives ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program" TEXT /* Loyalty program membership status */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_purchases" INTEGER /* Total number of purchases made by the customer */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_representatives" (
  "representative_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the sales representative */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sales representative */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the sales representative */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership where the representative works */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date the representative was hired */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the representative */,
  "total_sales" INTEGER /* Total number of sales made by the representative */,
  "total_sales_amount" REAL /* Total amount of sales made by the representative */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("representative_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_representatives_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_inventories" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "dealership_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dealership */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle in the inventory */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the vehicle in the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_inventories_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_inventories_dealership_id FOREIGN KEY ("dealership_id") REFERENCES dealerships ("dealership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Detailed permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
